channel.title: Cluster-Autoscaler on ivomarino.com
channel.description: Recent content in Cluster-Autoscaler on ivomarino.com

item.title: Kubernetes Node Autoscaling: When Pod Scaling Isn't the Answer
item.description: HPA scales pods, but pods can’t run if there’s no space on the cluster. Learn why cluster autoscaling is the answer for bursty, unpredictable workloads. Includes pod disruption budgets, graceful shutdown, and real patterns for scaling nodes alongside pod autoscaling.
